text: uvishenat achat lekhovresh melekh paras likhelovt devar-yehva mipi yiremeya he'ir yehva et-rucha koresh melekhe-paras vaya'aver-qovl bekhal-malekhutov vegam-bemikhetav lemor
ko amar koresh melekh paras kol mamelekhovt haarets natan li yehva elohey hashamayim vehu-faqad 'alay livenovt-lov vayit birushalaim asher bihuda
mi-vakhem mikal-'amov yehi elohayv 'imov veya'al lirushalaim asher bihuda veyiven et-beyt yehva elohey yiserael hu haelohim asher birushalaim
vekhal-hanishear mikal-hameqomovt asher hu gar-sham yenaseuhu aneshey meqomov bekhesef uvezahav uvirekhush uvivehema 'im-hanedava leveyt haelohim asher birushalaim
vayaqumu rashey haavovt lihuda uvineyamin vehakohanim vehaleviyim lekhol he'ir haelohim et-ruchov la'alovt livenovt et-beyt yehva asher birushalaim
vekhal-sevivoteyhem chizequ videyhem bikheley-khesef bazahav barekhush uvabehema uvamigedanovt levad 'al-kal-hitenadev s
vehamelekh kovresh hovtsi et-keley veyt-yehva asher hovtsi nevukhadenetsar mirushalaim vayitenem beveyt elohayv
vayovtsiem kovresh melekh paras 'al-yad miteredat hagizebar vayiseperem lesheshebatsar hanasi lihuda
veele miseparam agareteley zahav sheloshim agareteley-khesef alef machalafim tishe'a ve'eserim s
kefovrey zahav sheloshim kefovrey khesef mishenim areba' meovt va'asara kelim acherim alef s
kal-kelim lazahav velakesef chameshet alafim veareba' meovt hakol he'ela sheshebatsar 'im he'alovt hagovla mibavel lirushalaim f
veele ׀ beney hamedina ha'olim mishevi hagovla asher hegela nevukhadenetsovr kh nevukhadenetsar q melekhe-bavel levavel vayashuvu lirushalaim vihuda ish le'irov
asher-bau 'im-zerubavel yeshu'a nechemeya seraya re'elaya maredokhay bileshan misepar bigevay rechum ba'ana misepar aneshey 'am yiserael s
beney fare'osh alepayim mea shive'im ushenayim s
beney shefateya shelosh meovt shive'im ushenayim s
beney arach sheva' meovt chamisha veshive'im s
beney-fachat movav liveney yeshu'a yovav alepayim shemone meovt usheneym 'asar s
beney 'eylam elef matayim chamishim veareba'a s
beney zatu tesha' meovt veareba'im vachamisha s
beney zakay sheva' meovt veshishim s
beney vani shesh meovt areba'im ushenayim s
beney vevay shesh meovt 'eserim ushelosha s
beney 'azegad elef matayim 'eserim ushenayim s
beney adoniqam shesh meovt shishim veshisha s
beney vigevay alepayim chamishim veshisha s
beney 'adin areba' meovt chamishim veareba'a s
beney-ater lichizeqiya tishe'im ushemona s
beney vetsay shelosh meovt 'eserim ushelosha s
beney yovra mea usheneym 'asar s
beney chashum matayim 'eserim ushelosha s
beney gibar tishe'im vachamisha s
beney veyt-lachem mea 'eserim ushelosha s
aneshey netofa chamishim veshisha
aneshey 'anatovt mea 'eserim ushemona s
beney 'azemavet areba'im ushenayim s
beney qireyat 'arim kefira uveerovt sheva' meovt veareba'im ushelosha s
beney harama vagava' shesh meovt 'eserim veechad s
aneshey mikhemas mea 'eserim ushenayim s
aneshey veyt-el veha'ay matayim 'eserim ushelosha s
beney nevov chamishim ushenayim s
beney magebish mea chamishim veshisha s
beney 'eylam acher elef matayim chamishim veareba'a s
beney charim shelosh meovt ve'eserim s
beney-lod chadid veovnov sheva' meovt 'eserim vachamisha s
beney yerechov shelosh meovt areba'im vachamisha s
beney senaa sheloshet alafim veshesh meovt usheloshim s
hakohanim beney yeda'eya leveyt yeshu'a tesha' meovt shive'im ushelosha s
beney imer elef chamishim ushenayim s
beney fashechur elef matayim areba'im veshive'a s
beney charim elef veshive'a 'asar s
haleviyim beney-yeshu'a veqademiel liveney hovdaveya shive'im veareba'a s
hameshorerim beney asaf mea 'eserim ushemona f
beney hasho'arim beney-shalum beney-ater beney-talemovn beney-'aquv beney chatita beney shovay hakol mea sheloshim vetishe'a f
hanetinim beney-tsicha veney-chasufa beney taba'ovt
beney-qeros beney-si'aha beney fadovn
beney-levana veney-chagava beney 'aquv
beney-chagav beney shamelay kh shalemay q beney chanan
beney-gidel beney-gachar beney reaya
beney-retsin beney-neqovda beney gazam
beney-'uza veney-fasecha beney vesay
beney-asena veney me'inim kh me'unim q beney nefisim kh nefusim q
beney-vaqebuq beney-chaqufa beney charechur
beney-vatselut beney-mechida beney charesha
beney-vareqovs beney-sisera beney-tamach
beney netsicha beney chatifa
beney 'avedey shelomo beney-sotay beney-hasoferet beney feruda
beney-ya'ela veney-dareqovn beney gidel
beney shefateya veney-chatil beney pokheret hatsevayim beney ami
kal-hanetinim uveney 'avedey shelomo shelosh meovt tishe'im ushenayim s
veele ha'olim mitel melach tel charesha keruv adan imer velo yakhelu lehagid beyt-avovtam vezare'am im miyiserael hem
beney-delaya veney-tovviya beney neqovda shesh meovt chamishim ushenayim s
umibeney hakohanim beney chovaya beney haqovts beney varezilay asher laqach mibenovt barezilay hagile'adi isha vayiqare 'al-shemam
ele biqeshu khetavam hamiteyachesim velo nimetsau vayegoalu min-hakehuna
vayomer hatireshata lahem asher lo-yokhelu miqodesh haqodashim 'ad 'amod kohen leurim uletumim
kal-haqahal keechad areba' ribov alepayim shelosh-meovt shishim
milevad 'avedeyhem veamehoteyhem ele shive'at alafim shelosh meovt sheloshim veshive'a velahem meshorerim umeshorerovt matayim
suseyhem sheva' meovt sheloshim veshisha piredeyhem matayim areba'im vachamisha
gemaleyhem areba' meovt sheloshim vachamisha chamorim sheshet alafim sheva' meovt ve'eserim f
umerashey haavovt bevovam leveyt yehva asher birushalaim hitenadevu leveyt haelohim leha'amidov 'al-mekhovnov
kekhocham natenu leovtsar hamelakha zahav darekemovnim shesh-ribovt vaelef s vekhesef manim chameshet alafim vekhatenot kohanim mea s
vayeshevu hakohanim vehaleviyim umin-ha'am vehameshorerim vehashov'arim vehanetinim be'areyhem vekhal-yiserael be'areyhem s
vayiga' hachodesh hashevi'i uveney yiserael be'arim s vayeasefu ha'am keish echad el-yerushalaim s
vayaqam yeshu'a ben-yovtsadaq veechayv hakohanim uzerubavel ben-shealetiel veechayv vayivenu et-mizebach elohey yiserael leha'alovt 'alayv 'olovt kakatuv betovrat moshe ish-haelohim
vayakhinu hamizebecha 'al-mekhovnotayv ki beeyma 'aleyhem me'amey haaratsovt vaya'al kh vaya'alu q 'alayv 'olovt layhva 'olovt laboqer vela'arev
vaya'asu et-chag hasukovt kakatuv ve'olat yovm beyovm bemisepar kemishepat devar-yovm beyovmov
veachareykhen 'olat tamid velechodashim ulekhal-mov'adey yehva hamequdashim ulekhol mitenadev nedava layhva
miyovm echad lachodesh hashevi'i hechelu leha'alovt 'olovt layhva veheykhal yehva lo yusad
vayitenu-khesef lachotsevim velecharashim umaakhal umishete vashemen latsidonim velatsorim lehavi 'atsey arazim min-halevanovn el-yam yafov kerisheyovn kovresh melekhe-paras 'aleyhem f

uvashana hashenit levovam el-beyt haelohim lirushalaim bachodesh hasheni hechelu zerubavel benshe-aletiel veyeshu'a ben-yovtsadaq ushear acheyhem ׀ hakohanim vehaleviyim vekhal-habaim mehashevi yerushalaim vaya'amidu et-haleviyim miben 'eserim shana vama'ela lenatsecha 'al-melekhet beyt-yehva f
vaya'amod yeshu'a banayv veechayv qademiel uvanayv beney-yehuda keechad lenatsecha 'al-'ose hamelakha beveyt haelohim s beney chenadad beneyhem vaacheyhem haleviyim
veyisedu habonim et-heykhal yehva vaya'amidu hakohanim melubashim bachatsotserovt vehaleviyim beney-asaf bametsiletayim lehalel et-yehva 'al-yedey david melekhe-yiserael
vaya'anu behalel uvehovdot layhva ki tovv ki-le'ovlam chasedov 'al-yiserael vekhal-ha'am heri'u teru'a gedovla vehalel layhva 'al husad beyt-yehva s
verabim mehakohanim vehaleviyim verashey haavovt hazeqenim asher rau et-habayit harishovn beyasedov ze habayit be'eyneyhem bokhim beqovl gadovl verabim biteru'a vesimecha leharim qovl
veeyn ha'am makirim qovl teru'at hasimecha leqovl bekhi ha'am ki ha'am meri'im teru'a gedovla vehaqovl nishema' 'ad-lemerachovq f
vayisheme'u tsarey yehuda uvineyamin ki-veney hagovla bovnim heykhal layhva elohey yiserael
vayigeshu el-zerubavel veel-rashey haavovt vayomeru lahem nivene 'imakhem ki khakhem niderovsh leloheykhem velo kh velov ׀ q anachenu zovechim mimey esar chadon melekh ashur hama'ale otanu po

vayomer lahem zerubavel veyeshu'a ushear rashey haavovt leyiserael lo-lakhem valanu livenovt bayit leloheynu ki anachenu yachad nivene layhva elohey yiserael kaasher tsivanu hamelekh kovresh melekhe-paras
vayehi 'am-haarets merapim yedey 'am-yehuda umevalahim kh umevahalim q ovtam livenovt
vesokherim 'aleyhem yov'atsim lehafer 'atsatam kal-yemey kovresh melekh paras ve'ad-malekhut dareyavesh melekhe-paras
uvemalekhut achasheverovsh bitechilat malekhutov katevu sitena 'al-yoshevey yehuda virushalaim s
uvimey aretacheshaseta katav bishelam miteredat taveel ushear kenaotov kh kenaotayv q 'al aretacheshaseta kh aretacheshaset q melekh paras ukhetav hanishetevan katuv aramit umeturegam aramit f
rechum be'el-te'em veshimeshay safera ketavu igera chada 'al-yerushelem learetacheshasete maleka kenema
edayin rechum be'el-te'em veshimeshay safera ushear kenavatehovn dinaye vaafaresatekhaye tarepelaye afaresaye arekevay kh arekevaye q vavelaye shushanekhaye dihu kh dehaye q 'elemaye
ushear umaya di hageli asenapar raba veyaqira vehovtev himov beqireya di shamerayin ushear 'avar-nahara ukhe'enet
dena pareshegen igareta di shelachu 'alovhi 'al-aretacheshasete maleka 'avedayikh kh 'avedakh q enash 'avar-nahara ukhe'enet f
yedi'a leheve lemaleka di yehudaye di seliqu min-levatakh 'aleyna atov lirushelem qireyeta maradeta uviysheta banayin veshuraya kh veshuraya q eshekhelilu kh shakhelilu q veushaya yachitu
ke'an yedi'a leheve lemaleka di hen qireyeta dakh titebene veshuraya yishetakhelelun minedah-velov vahalakh la yinetenun veapetom malekhim tehaneziq
ke'an kal-qovel di-melach heykhela melachena ve'arevat maleka la arikhe-lana lemecheze 'al-dena shelachena vehovda'ena lemaleka

di yevaqar bisefar-dakheranaya di avahatakh utehashekach bisefar dakheranaya vetineda' di qireyeta dakh qireya marada umehanezeqat malekhin umedinan veeshetadur 'avedin begavah min-yovmat 'alema 'al-dena qireyeta dakh hacharevat
mehovde'in anachena lemaleka di hen qireyeta dakh titebene veshuraya yishetakhelelun laqovel dena chalaq ba'avar nahara la itay lakh f
pitegama shelach maleka 'al-rechum be'el-te'em veshimeshay safera ushear kenavatehovn di yatevin beshamerayin ushear 'avar-nahara shelam ukhe'et s
nishetevana di shelachetun 'aleyna mefarash qeri qadamay
umini sim te'em uvaqaru vehashekachu di qireyeta dakh min-yovmat 'alema 'al-malekhin mitenasea umerad veeshetadur mite'aved-bah
umalekhin taqifin haov 'al-yerushelem veshalitin bekhol 'avar nahara umida velov vahalakh miteyehev lehovn
ke'an simu te'em levatala guveraya ilekh veqireyeta dakh la titebene 'ad-mini ta'ema yitesam
uzehirin heov shalu leme'ebad 'al-dena lema yisege chavala lehanezaqat malekhin s

edayin min-di pareshegen nishetevana di aretacheshaseta kh aretacheshaset q maleka qeri qodam-rechum veshimeshay safera ukhenavatehovn azalu vivehilu lirushelem 'al-yehudaye uvatilu himov beedera' vechayil s
bedayin betelat 'avidat beyt-elaha di birushelem vahavat batela 'ad shenat tareteyn lemalekhut dareyavesh melekhe-paras f
vehitenabi chagay nevia kh neviya q uzekhareya var-'idov neviaya kh neviyaya q 'al-yehudaye di vihud uvirushelem beshum elah yiserael 'aleyhovn s
bedayin qamu zerubavel bar-shealetiel veyeshu'a bar-yovtsadaq veshariv lemivene beyt elaha di virushelem ve'imehovn neviaya kh neviyaya q di-elaha mesa'adin lehovn ׃ f
beh-zimena ata 'aleyhovn tatenay pachat 'avar-nahara ushetar bovzenay ukhenavatehovn vekhen amerin lehom man-sam lekhom te'em bayeta dena libene veusharena dena leshakhelala s
edayin kenema amarena lehom man-inun shemahat guveraya di-dena vineyana banayin
ve'eyn elahahom havat 'al-savey yehudaye vela-vatilu himov 'ad-ta'ema ledareyavesh yehakh veedayin yetivun nishetevana 'al-dena f
pareshegen igareta di-shelach tatenay ׀ pachat 'avar-nahara ushetar bovzenay ukhenavateh afaresekhaye di ba'avar nahara 'al-dareyavesh maleka
pitegama shelachu 'alovhi vekhidena ketiv begaveh ledareyavesh maleka shelama khola s
yedi'a ׀ leheve lemaleka di-azalena lihud medineta leveyt elaha raba vehu mitebene even gelal vea' mitesam bekhutelaya va'avideta dakh aseparena mite'aveda umatselach beyedehom s
edayin sheelena lesavaya ilekh kenema amarena lehom man-sam lekhom te'em bayeta dena lemiveneya veusharena dena leshakhelala
veaf shemahatehom sheelena lehom lehovda'utakh di nikhetuv shum-guveraya di verasheyhom s
ukhenema fitegama hativuna lememar anachena himov 'avedovhi di-elah shemaya veare'a uvanayin bayeta di-hava vene miqademat dena shenin sagian umelekh leyiserael rav benahi veshakheleleh
lahen min-di haregizu avahotana leelah shemaya yehav himov beyad nevukhadenetsar melekhe-bavel kasedaya kh kasedaa q uvayeta dena satereh ve'ama hageli levavel s
beram bishenat chada lekhovresh maleka di vavel kovresh maleka sam te'em beyt-elaha dena libene

veaf manaya di-veyt-elaha di dahava vekhasepa di nevukhadenetsar hanepeq min-heykhela di virushelem veheyvel himov leheykhela di vavel hanepeq himov kovresh maleka min-heykhela di vavel vihivu lesheshebatsar shemeh di fecha sameh
vaamar-leh ׀ ele kh el q manaya ezel-achet himov beheykhela di virushelem uveyt elaha yitebene 'al-atereh s
edayin sheshebatsar dekh ata yehav ushaya di-veyt elaha di virushelem umin-edayin ve'ad-ke'an mitebene vela shelim
ukhe'an hen 'al-maleka tav yitebaqar beveyt ginezaya di-maleka tama di bevavel hen itay di-min-kovresh maleka sim te'em lemivene beyt-elaha dekh birushelem ure'ut maleka 'al-dena yishelach 'aleyna s
bedayin dareyavesh maleka sam te'em uvaqaru ׀ beveyt siferaya di ginezaya mehachatin tama bevavel
vehishetekhach beachemeta bevireta di bemaday medineta megila chada vekhen-ketiv begavah dikherovna f
bishenat chada lekhovresh maleka kovresh maleka sam te'em beyt-elaha virushelem bayeta yitebene atar di-davechin divechin veushovhi mesovvelin rumeh amin shitin petayeh amin shitin
nidebakhin di-even gelal telata venidebakh di-a' chadat venifeqeta min-beyt maleka titeyehiv
veaf maney veyt-elaha di dahava vekhasepa di nevukhadenetsar hanepeq min-heykhela di-virushelem veheyvel levavel yahativun vihakh leheykhela di-virushelem leatereh vetachet beveyt elaha s
ke'an tatenay pachat 'avar-nahara shetar bovzenay ukhenavatehovn afaresekhaye di ba'avar nahara rachiqin haov min-tama
shevuqu la'avidat beyt-elaha dekh pachat yehudaye ulesavey yehudaye beyt-elaha dekh yivenovn 'al-atereh
umini sim te'em lema di-ta'avedun 'im-savey yehudaye ilekh lemivene beyt-elaha dekh uminikhesey maleka di midat 'avar nahara aseparena nifeqeta teheve miteyahava leguveraya ilekh di-la levatala
uma chashechan uveney tovrin vedikherin veimerin ׀ la'alavan ׀ leelah shemaya chinetin melach ׀ chamar umeshach kememar kahanaya di-virushelem leheve miteyehev lehom yovm ׀ beyovm di-la shalu
di-leheon mehaqerevin nichovchin leelah shemaya umetsalayin lechayey maleka uvenovhi
umini sim te'em di khal-enash di yehashene pitegama dena yitenesach a' min-bayeteh uzeqif yitemeche 'alohi uvayeteh nevalu yite'aved 'al-dena
velaha di shakin shemeh tama yemagar kal-melekh ve'am di ׀ yishelach yedeh lehashenaya lechabala beyt-elaha dekh di virushelem ana dareyavesh samet te'em aseparena yite'avid f
edayin tatenay pachat 'avar-nahara shetar bovzenay ukhenavatehovn laqovel di-shelach dareyavesh maleka kenema aseparena 'avadu
vesavey yehudaye banayin umatselechin binevuat chagay nevia kh neviya q uzekhareya bar-'idov uvenov veshakhelilu min-ta'am elah yiserael umite'em kovresh vedareyavesh vearetacheshasete melekh paras
vesheytsi bayeta dena 'ad yovm telata lirach adar di-hi shenat-shet lemalekhut dareyavesh maleka f
va'avadu veney-yiserael kahanaya velevaye ushear beney-galuta chanukat beyt-elaha dena bechedeva
vehaqerivu lachanukat beyt-elaha dena tovrin mea dikherin matayin imerin areba' mea utsefirey 'izin lechataya kh lechataa q 'al-kal-yiserael terey-'asar lemineyan shivetey yiserael
vahaqimu khahanaya bifelugatehovn velevaye bemacheleqatehovn 'al-'avidat elaha di virushelem kikhetav sefar moshe f
vaya'asu veney-hagovla et-hapasach beareba'a 'asar lachodesh harishovn
ki hitaharu hakohanim vehaleviyim keechad kulam tehovrim vayishechatu hapesach lekhal-beney hagovla velaacheyhem hakohanim velahem
vayokhelu veney-yiserael hashavim mehagovla vekhol hanivedal mitumeat govye-haarets alehem liderosh layhva elohey yiserael
vaya'asu chag-matsovt shive'at yamim besimecha ki ׀ simecham yehva vehesev lev melekhe-ashur 'aleyhem lechazeq yedeyhem bimelekhet beyt-haelohim elohey yiserael f
veachar hadevarim haele bemalekhut aretacheshasete melekhe-paras 'ezera ben-seraya ben-'azareya ben-chileqiya
ben-shalum ben-tsadovq ben-achituv
ben-amareya ven-'azareya ben-merayovt
ben-zeracheya ven-'uzi ben-buqi
ben-avishu'a ben-pinechas ben-ele'azar ben-aharon hakohen harosh
hu 'ezera 'ala mibavel vehu-sofer mahir betovrat moshe asher-natan yehva elohey yiserael vayiten-lov hamelekh keyad-yehva elohayv 'alayv kol baqashatov f
vaya'alu mibeney-yiserael umin-hakohanim vehaleviyim vehameshorerim vehasho'arim vehanetinim el-yerushalaim bishenat-sheva' learetacheshasete hamelekh
vayavo yerushalaim bachodesh hachamishi hi shenat hashevi'it lamelekh
ki beechad lachodesh harishovn hu yesud hama'ala mibavel uveechad lachodesh hachamishi ba el-yerushalaim keyad-elohayv hatovva 'alayv
ki 'ezera hekhin levavov liderovsh et-tovrat yehva vela'asot ulelamed beyiserael choq umishepat s
veze ׀ pareshegen hanishetevan asher natan hamelekh aretacheshasete le'ezera hakohen hasofer sofer diverey mitseot-yehva vechuqayv 'al-yiserael f
aretacheshasete melekh malekhaya le'ezera khahana safar data di-elah shemaya gemir ukhe'enet
mini sim te'em di khal-mitenadav bemalekhuti min-'ama yiserael vekhahanovhi velevaye limehakh lirushelem 'imakh yehakh
kal-qovel di min-qodam maleka veshive'at ya'atohi shelicha levaqara 'al-yehud velirushelem bedat elahakh di vidakh
uleheyvala kesaf udehav di-maleka veya'atovhi hitenadavu leelah yiserael di virushelem mishekeneh
vekhol kesaf udehav di tehashekach bekhol medinat bavel 'im hitenadavut 'ama vekhahanaya mitenadevin leveyt elahahom di virushelem
kal-qovel dena aseparena tiqene bekhasepa dena tovrin ׀ dikherin imerin uminechatehovn venisekeyhovn uteqarev himov 'al-madebecha di beyt elahakhom di virushelem
uma di 'alayikh kh 'alakh q ve'al echayikh kh echakh q yitav bishear kasepa vedahava leme'ebad kire'ut elahakhom ta'avedun
umanaya di-miteyahavin lakh lefalechan beyt elahakh hashelem qodam elah yerushelem
ushear chashechut beyt elahakh di yipel-lakh leminetan tineten min-beyt ginezey maleka
umini ana aretacheshasete maleka sim te'em lekhol gizaveraya di ba'avar nahara di khal-di yishealenekhovn 'ezera khahana safar data di-elah shemaya aseparena yite'avid
'ad-kesaf kakerin mea ve'ad-chinetin korin mea ve'ad-chamar batin mea ve'ad-batin meshach mea umelach di-la khetav
kal-di min-ta'am elah shemaya yite'aved aderazeda leveyt elah shemaya di-lema leheve qetsaf 'al-malekhut maleka uvenovhi
ulekhom mehovde'in di khal-kahanaya velevaye zamaraya tara'aya netinaya ufalechey beyt elaha dena mineda velov vahalakh la shalit lemireme 'aleyhom
veanet 'ezera kechakhemat elahakh di-vidakh meni shafetin vedayanin di-leheon daanin kh dayenin q lekhal-'ama di ba'avar nahara lekhal-yade'ey datey elahakh vedi la yada' tehovde'un
vekhal-di-la leheve 'aved data di-elahakh vedata di maleka aseparena dina leheve mite'aved mineh hen lemovt hen lisheroshu kh lisheroshi q hen-la'anash nikhesin veleesurin f
barukh yehva elohey avovteynu asher natan kazot belev hamelekh lefaer et-beyt yehva asher birushalaim
ve'alay hitah-chesed lifeney hamelekh veyov'atsayv ulekhal-sarey hamelekh hagiborim vaani hitechazaqeti keyad-yehva elohay 'alay vaeqebetsa miyiserael rashim la'alovt 'imi f
veele rashey avoteyhem vehiteyachesam ha'olim 'imi bemalekhut aretacheshasete hamelekh mibavel s
mibeney finechas gereshom s mibeney itamar daniyel s mibeney david chatush s
mibeney shekhaneya s mibeney fare'osh zekhareya ve'imov hiteyaches lizekharim mea vachamishim s

umibeney 'adin 'eved ben-yovnatan ve'imov chamishim hazekharim s
umibeney 'eylam yesha'eya ben-'ataleya ve'imov shive'im hazekharim s
umibeney shefateya zevadeya ben-mikhael ve'imov shemonim hazekharim s

umibeney shelovmit ben-yovsifeya ve'imov mea veshishim hazekharim s
umibeney vevay zekhareya ben-bevay ve'imov 'eserim ushemona hazekharim s
umibeney 'azegad yovchanan ben-haqatan ve'imov mea va'asara hazekharim s
umibeney adoniqam acharonim veele shemovtam elifelet ye'iel ushema'eya ve'imahem shishim hazekharim s
umibeney vigevay 'utay vezavud kh vezakur q ve'imov shive'im hazekharim f
vaeqebetsem el-hanahar haba el-ahava vanachane sham yamim shelosha vaavina va'am uvakohanim umibeney levi lo-matsati sham
vaeshelecha leeli'ezer laariel lishema'eya uleelenatan uleyariv uleelenatan ulenatan velizekhareya velimeshulam rashim uleyovyariv uleelenatan mevinim ׃
vaovtsia kh vaatsave q ovtam 'al-idov harosh bekhasifeya hamaqovm vaasima befihem devarim ledaber el-idov achiv hanetunim kh hanetinim q bekhasifeya hamaqovm lehavi-lanu mesharetim leveyt eloheynu
vayaviu lanu keyad-eloheynu hatovva 'aleynu ish sekhel mibeney macheli ben-levi ben-yiserael veshereveya uvanayv veechayv shemona 'asar
veet-chashaveya veitov yesha'eya mibeney merari echayv uveneyhem 'eserim s
umin-hanetinim shenatan david vehasarim la'avodat haleviyim netinim matayim ve'eserim kulam niqevu veshemovt
vaeqera sham tsovm 'al-hanahar ahava lehite'anovt lifeney eloheynu levaqesh mimenu derekh yeshara lanu uletapenu ulekhal-rekhushenu
ki vosheti lisheovl min-hamelekh chayil ufarashim le'azerenu meovyev badarekh ki-amarenu lamelekh lemor yad-eloheynu 'al-kal-mevaqeshayv letovva ve'uzov veapov 'al kal-'ozevayv
vanatsuma vanevaqesha meeloheynu 'al-zot vaye'ater lanu
vaavedila misarey hakohanim sheneym 'asar leshereveya chashaveya ve'imahem meacheyhem 'asara
vaesheqovla kh vaesheqola q lahem et-hakesef veet-hazahav veet-hakelim terumat beyt-eloheynu haherimu hamelekh veyo'atsayv vesarayv vekhal-yiserael hanimetsaim
vaesheqala 'al-yadam kesef kikarim shesh-meovt vachamishim ukheley-khesef mea lekhikarim zahav mea khikar
ukheforey zahav 'eserim laadarekhonim alef ukheley nechoshet mutsehav tovva shenayim chamudot kazahav
vaomera alehem atem qodesh layhva vehakelim qodesh vehakesef vehazahav nedava layhva elohey avoteykhem
shiqedu veshimeru 'ad-tisheqelu lifeney sarey hakohanim vehaleviyim vesarey-haavovt leyiserael birushalaim halishekhovt beyt yehva
veqibelu hakohanim vehaleviyim misheqal hakesef vehazahav vehakelim lehavi lirushalaim leveyt eloheynu f
vanise'a minehar ahava bisheneym 'asar lachodesh harishovn lalekhet yerushalaim veyad-eloheynu hayeta 'aleynu vayatsilenu mikaf ovyev veovrev 'al-hadarekh
vanavov yerushalaim vaneshev sham yamim shelosha
uvayovm harevi'i nisheqal hakesef vehazahav vehakelim beveyt eloheynu 'al yad-meremovt ben-uriya hakohen ve'imov ele'azar ben-pinechas ve'imahem yovzavad ben-yeshu'a venov'adeya ven-binuy haleviyim
bemisepar bemisheqal lakol vayikatev kal-hamisheqal ba'et hahi f

habaim mehashevi veney-hagovla hiqerivu 'olovt ׀ lelohey yiserael parim sheneym-'asar 'al-kal-yiserael eylim ׀ tishe'im veshisha kevasim shive'im veshive'a tsefirey chatat sheneym 'asar hakol 'ovla layhva f
vayitenu ׀ et-datey hamelekh laachashedarepeney hamelekh ufachaovt 'ever hanahar veniseu et-ha'am veet-beyt-haelohim s

ukhekhalovt ele nigeshu elay hasarim lemor lo-nivedelu ha'am yiserael vehakohanim vehaleviyim me'amey haaratsovt ketov'avoteyhem lakena'ani hachiti haperizi hayevusi ha'amoni hamoavi hamitseri vehaemori
ki-naseu mibenoteyhem lahem veliveneyhem vehite'arevu zera' haqodesh be'amey haaratsovt veyad hasarim vehaseganim hayeta bama'al haze rishovna s
ukheshame'i et-hadavar haze qara'eti et-bigedi ume'ili vaemereta mise'ar roshi uzeqani vaesheva meshovmem
veelay yeasefu kol chared bediverey elohey-yiserael 'al ma'al hagovla vaani yoshev meshovmem 'ad leminechat ha'arev
uveminechat ha'erev qameti mita'aniti uveqare'i vigedi ume'ili vaekhere'a 'al-birekay vaeferesa khapay el-yehva elohay
vaomera elohay bosheti venikhelameti leharim elohay panay eleykha ki 'aonoteynu ravu lema'ela rosh veashematenu gadela 'ad lashamayim
mimey avoteynu anachenu beashema gedola 'ad hayovm haze uva'aonoteynu nitanu anachenu melakheynu khohaneynu beyad ׀ malekhey haaratsovt bacherev bashevi uvabiza uvevoshet panim kehayovm haze
ve'ata kime'at-rega' hayeta techina meet ׀ yehva eloheynu lehasheir lanu peleyta velatet-lanu yated bimeqovm qadeshov lehair 'eyneynu eloheynu uletitenu micheya me'at be'avedutenu

ki-'avadim anachenu uve'avedutenu lo 'azavanu eloheynu vayat-'aleynu chesed lifeney malekhey faras latet-lanu micheya lerovmem et-beyt eloheynu uleha'amid et-charevotayv velatet-lanu gader bihuda uvirushalaim s
ve'ata mah-nomar eloheynu acharey-zot ki 'azavenu mitseoteykha
asher tsivita beyad 'avadeykha haneviim lemor haarets asher atem baim lerishetah erets nida hi benidat 'amey haaratsovt betov'avoteyhem asher mileuha mipe el-pe betumeatam

ve'ata benovteykhem al-titenu liveneyhem uvenoteyhem al-tiseu liveneykhem velo-tidereshu shelomam vetovvatam 'ad-'ovlam lema'an techezequ vaakhaletem et-tuv haarets vehovrashetem liveneykhem 'ad-'ovlam
veacharey kal-haba 'aleynu bema'aseynu hara'im uveashematenu hagedola ki ׀ ata eloheynu chasakheta lemata me'aonenu venatata lanu peleyta kazot
hanashuv lehafer mitseoteykha ulehitechaten be'amey hato'evovt haele halov teenaf-banu 'ad-kale leeyn sheerit ufeleyta f
yehva elohey yiserael tsadiq ata ki-nishearenu feleyta kehayovm haze hinenu lefaneykha beashemateynu ki eyn la'amovd lefaneykha 'al-zot f
ukhehitepalel 'ezera ukhehitevadotov bokhe umitenapel lifeney beyt haelohim niqebetsu elayv miyiserael qahal rav-meod anashim venashim viladim ki-vakhu ha'am harebeh-vekhe s
vaya'an shekhaneya ven-yechiel mibeney 'ovlam kh 'eylam q vayomer le'ezera anachenu ma'alenu veloheynu vanoshev nashim nakheriyovt me'amey haarets ve'ata yesh-miqeve leyiserael 'al-zot
ve'ata nikherat-berit leloheynu lehovtsi khal-nashim vehanovlad mehem ba'atsat adonay vehacharedim bemitsevat eloheynu vekhatovra ye'ase
qum ki-'aleykha hadavar vaanachenu 'imakh chazaq va'ase f
vayaqam 'ezera vayasheba' et-sarey hakohanim haleviyim vekhal-yiserael la'asovt kadavar haze vayishave'u
vayaqam 'ezera milifeney beyt haelohim vayelekh el-lishekat yehovchanan ben-eleyashiv vayelekh sham lechem lo-akhal umayim lo-shata ki miteabel 'al-ma'al hagovla s
vaya'aviru qovl bihuda virushalaim lekhol beney hagovla lehiqavets yerushalaim
vekhol asher lo-yavov lisheloshet hayamim ka'atsat hasarim vehazeqenim yachoram kal-rekhushov vehu yibadel miqehal hagovla s

vayiqavetsu khal-aneshey-yehuda uvineyamin ׀ yerushalaim lisheloshet hayamim hu chodesh hateshi'i be'eserim bachodesh vayeshevu khal-ha'am birechovv beyt haelohim mare'idim 'al-hadavar umehageshamim f
vayaqam 'ezera hakohen vayomer alehem atem me'aletem vatoshivu nashim nakheriyovt lehovsif 'al-ashemat yiserael
ve'ata tenu tovda layhva elohey-avoteykhem va'asu retsovnov vehibadelu me'amey haarets umin-hanashim hanakheriyovt
vaya'enu khal-haqahal vayomeru qovl gadovl ken kedivereykha kh kidevarekha q 'aleynu la'asovt
aval ha'am rav veha'et geshamim veeyn kocha la'amovd bachuts vehamelakha lo-leyovm echad velo lishenayim ki-hirebinu lifesho'a badavar haze

ya'amedu-na reynu lekhal-haqahal vekhol ׀ asher be'areynu hahoshiv nashim nakheriyovt yavo le'itim mezumanim ve'imahem ziqeney-'ir va'ir veshofeteyha 'ad lehashiv charovn af-eloheynu mimenu 'ad ladavar haze f
akh yovnatan ben-'asahel veyachezeya ven-tiqeva 'amedu 'al-zot umeshulam veshabetay halevi 'azarum
vaya'asu-khen beney hagovla vayibadelu 'ezera hakohen anashim rashey haavovt leveyt avotam vekhulam beshemovt vayeshevu beyovm echad lachodesh ha'asiri ledareyovsh hadavar
vayekhalu vakol anashim hahoshivu nashim nakheriyovt 'ad yovm echad lachodesh harishovn f
vayimatse mibeney hakohanim asher hoshivu nashim nakheriyovt mibeney yeshu'a ben-yovtsadaq veechayv ma'aseya veeli'ezer veyariv ugedaleya
